DECLARATION OF ELIA A. HILL IN SUPPORT OF AMENDED JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HILL, ELI A.
DEMAND FOR JURY FILED BY DEFENDANT DONNET, CYNTHIA

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: JUDGMENT FOR DEFENDANT CYNTHIA DONNET, PROVIDED THAT DEFT. PAY THE SUM OF $1836 TO PLAINTIFF ELI A. HILL ON OR BEFORE 4/13/98 AT 4:30 PM. IN THE EVENT THAT JUDGMENT FOR THE AMOUNT OF $1836 IS NOT PAID TO PLAINTIFF WITHIN THE TIME SET FORTH ABOVE, JUDGMENT FOR PLAINTIFF FOR RESTITUTION & POSSESSION OF THE PROPERTY LOCATED AT 533 7TH AVE, RENT & DAMAGES IN THE SUM OF $2040, AND COSTS AS PER COST BILL. SEE JUDGMENT
